audit_items.proof_trace: Cache key (blockRootHex, index) excludes signature field. Attacker submits sidecar_1 with valid signature (enters cache), then sidecar_2 with invalid signature but same header → cache hit at L301 returns cached entry without executing validateGossipDataColumnSidecar (L317), bypassing signature verification (dataColumnSidecar.ts:127-137).
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends valid DataColumnSidecar to populate cache, then resubmits with forged signature. Cache hit causes early return (L307) before validation, accepting and rebroadcasting invalid-signature sidecar to peers via P2P gossip.
